dev.description: Public development set -- 50 theorems shared evaluation
dev.anti_gaming_note: This split is released publicly; models may have been trained on these items.

hidden.description: Hidden evaluation set -- Claude-only 103-theorem full eval (53 theorems not in dev)
hidden.note: Items NOT in the dev split; used for blind evaluation

credit: Split design adapted from ChaosBench-Logic v3 hidden evaluation methodology (Thomas 2026, NeurIPS D&B Track)
